mdSummary:
# ShimmerButton

Button with animated shimmer border beam.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/shimmer-button

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ShimmerButton | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ShimmerButton | OnClick | `EventCallback<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>` | `` |  |
| ShimmerButton | Shimmer | `bool` | `true` |  |
| ShimmerButton | ShimmerColor | `string?` | `` | CSS color used for the shimmer sweep — defaults to a translucent foreground. |
| ShimmerButton | Variant | `Button.ButtonVariant` | `Button.ButtonVariant.Default` |  |
| ShimmerButton | Size | `Button.ButtonSize` | `Button.ButtonSize.Default` |  |
| ShimmerButton | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| ShimmerButton | PressEffect | `Button.ButtonPressEffect` | `Button.ButtonPressEffect.None` | Visual feedback when the button is pressed down. Default is None (no press animation — original behaviour). |
| ShimmerButton | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ShimmerButton | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
